Tests the Math.exp function with an input of -0 to verify it returns 1.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that uses an assertion to verify the behavior of the `Math.exp` function in JavaScript. The assertion checks that the exponential function `Math.exp` returns `1` when the input is `-0`. This test ensures that the implementation of `Math.exp` conforms to the expected mathematical property where the exponential of zero, including negative zero, is one. The script provides narrow functionality focused on validating a specific aspect of the `Math.exp` function.
